fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer number.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a ship-to address code.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name associated with the ship-to address.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ship-to address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city the items are being shipped to.

fields.name: Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you contact about orders shipped to this address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient's telephone number.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the salesperson who normally handles this customer's recipient.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the shipment method to be used for the recipient.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the ship-to address was last modified.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code to be used for the recipient.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient's fax number.

fields.name: GLN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient's GLN code.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province, or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient's email address.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient's web site.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.
